name: Atomic transaction flows

steps.condition: Atomic transaction without snoops and with data return
RN-F0 sends an Atomic transaction to HN-F.
Sends DBIDResp to RN-F0 to obtain the Atomic transaction data.
Sends SnpUnique Snoop request to other RN-F nodes after determining that snoops are required.
HN-F is permitted, but not required, to send a speculative ReadNoSnp to SN-F.
RN-F2 has the cache line in UD state and responds by sending data and invalidating its own cached copy.

completionCondition: HN-F is permitted, but not required, to send a speculative ReadNoSnp to SN-F.
